title: Get and Put Files
html:
description: Get a remote file or send a remote file using NetExec

Get and Put Files

Send a File to the Remote Target

Send a local file to the remote target

nxc ssh <TARGET> -u <USERNAME> -p <PASSWORD> --put-file file.txt /tmp/file.txt

Get a File From the Remote Target

Get a remote file on the remote target

nxc ssh <TARGET> -u <USERNAME> -p <PASSWORD> --get-file /tmp/file.txt file.txt
excerpt: description: Get a remote file or send a remote file using NetExec Get and Put Files Send a File to the Remote Target Send a local file to the remote target nxc ssh <TARGET> -u <USERNAME>
